verses.t: The message of the Word of (YAHUAH) HWHY to Yasharal by Mal’aḵi.
“I have loved you,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY. “But you asked, ‘In what way have You loved us?’ “Was not Ĕsaw Ya‛aqoḇ’s brother?” declares (YAHUAH) HWHY. “And I love Ya‛aqoḇ,
but I have hated Ĕsaw and have laid waste his mountains and his inheritance for the jackals of the wilderness.”

If Eḏom says, “We have been beaten down, let us return and build the ruins,” (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts said thus: “Let them build, but I tear down. And they shall be called ‘Border of Wrongness’ and the people against whom (YAHUAH) HWHY is enraged forever.
And your eyes shall see and you shall say, ‘Great is (YAHUAH) HWHY beyond the border of Yasharal!’

“A son esteems his father and a servant his master. And if I am the Father, where is My esteem? And if I am a Master, where is My fear? said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts to you kohanim who despise My Name. But you asked, ‘In what way have we despised Your Name?’
“You are presenting defiled food on My mizbe'ach. But you asked, ‘In what way have we defiled You?’ Because you say, ‘The table of (YAHUAH) HWHY is despicable.’

“And when you present the blind as a slaughtering, is it not evil? And when you present the lame and sick, is it not evil? Bring it then to your governor! Would he be pleased with you? Would he accept you favourably?” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts.
“And now, entreat the face of Al to show chen to us. This has been done by your hands. Would He show chen to you?” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts.

“Who among you who would shut the doors, so that you would not kindle fire on My mizbe'ach for naught? I have no pleasure in you,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts, “Nor do I accept an offering from your hands.

“For from the rising of the sun, even to its going down, My Name is great among nations and in every place incense is presented to My Name and a clean offering. For My Name is great among nations,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts.
“But you are profaning Me, in that you say, ‘The table of (YAHUAH) HWHY is defiled and its fruit, its food, is despicable.’

“And you said, ‘Oh, what weariness!’ and you sneered at it,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts. “And you brought in plunder and the lame and the sick – thus you have brought in the offering! Should I accept this from your hand?” said (YAHUAH) HWHY.

“But cursed be the deceiver who has a male in his flock and makes a vow, but is slaughtering to (YAHUAH) HWHY what is blemished. For I am a great Sovereign,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts, “and My Name is feared among nations.
“And now, O kohanim, this command is for you.

“If you do not hear and if you do not take it to heart, to give esteem to My Name,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts, “I shall send a curse upon you and I shall curse your berakoth. And indeed, I have cursed them, because you do not take it to heart.
“See, I shall rebuke your seed and scatter dung before your faces, the dung of your festivals. And you shall be taken away with it.

“See, I am sending My mal'ak and he shall prepare the way before Me. Then suddenly the Master you are seeking comes to His Hĕḵal, even the Mal'ak of the berith, in whom you delight. See, He is coming,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts.
“And who is able to bear the day of His coming and who is able to stand when He appears? For He is like the fire of a refiner and like the soap of a launderer.

“And He shall sit as a refiner and a cleanser of silver. And He shall cleanse the sons of Lĕwi and refine them as gold and silver and they shall belong to (YAHUAH) HWHY, bringing near an offering in righteousness.
“Then shall the offering of Yahuḏah and Yerushalayim be pleasant to (YAHUAH) HWHY, as in the days of old, as in former years.

“And I shall draw near to you for right-ruling. And I shall be a swift witness against the practisers of witchcraft and against adulterers and against them that swear to falsehood and against those who oppress the wage earner in his wages and widows

“For look, the day shall come, burning like a furnace and all the proud and every wrongdoer shall be stubble. And the day that shall come shall burn them up,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts, “which leaves to them neither root nor branch.
“But to you who fear My Name the Sun of Righteousness shall arise with healing in His wings. And you shall go out and leap for joy like calves from the stall.
“And you shall trample the wrongdoers, for they shall be ashes under the soles of your feet on the day that I do this,” said (YAHUAH) HWHY of hosts.
“Remember the Torah of Mosheh, My servant, which I commanded him in Ḥorĕḇ for all Yasharal – laws and right- rulings.
“See, I am sending you Aliyah the naḇi before the coming of the great and awesome day of (YAHUAH) HWHY.
“And he shall turn the hearts of the fathers to the children and the hearts of the children to their fathers, lest I come and smite the earth with utter destruction.”
